name: CCT & WATT SELECTABLE SHOEBOX LIGHT – 200W/ 240W/ 300W
description: 200 | 240 | 300 Wattage Adjustable LED shoebox light – parking lot light has durable die-cast one-piece aluminum housing that is powder coated with strong anti-corrosion performance for years of maintenance-free lighting. This LED parking lot light ships with NEMA Socket and Shortening Cap.
short_desc: Key Features Wattage Options: 200W / 240W / 300W (Adjustable) Lumens Output: 30,600 / 33,660 / 36,720 Lumens per Watt: 153 lm/W Replaces: 400W or 1000W Metal Halide Voltage Options: 100–277V or 277–480V Color Temperature: 3000K / 4000K / 5000K (Adjustable) CRI: 70+ Dimming: Not Dimmable Beam Angle: Type 3 Optics: Polycarbonate Lens Lifespan: 100,000 hours (L70) Mounting Options: Arm, Slip Fitter, or Trunnion EPA Rating: 1.4 Fixture Color: Bronze Frequency: 50–60Hz Power Factor: > 0.90 Total Harmonic Distortion (THD): < 15% Durable Construction Housing Material: Die-Cast Aluminum IP Rating: IP65 (Weatherproof) Operating Temperature: -40°F to +113°F Certifications: UL Listed, DLC Premium Warranty: 5 Years Measurements Dimensions: 16 x 11.8 x 3 in Weight: 9.1 lbs Features & Accessories Color Adjustable Wattage Adjustable Integrated Photocell
